# Documentation References

The following references provide documentation and design guidelines for schema validation, turn classification, and trace replaying:

* [Zod Documentation](https://zod.dev/) — Schema validation and TS type inference.
* [TypeBox GitHub](https://github.com/sinclairzx81/typebox) — JSON Schema builder with static type inference.
* [Ajv JSON Schema Validator](https://ajv.js.org/) — Battle-tested high-performance JSON Schema validator.
* [Langfuse Observability](https://langfuse.com/) — Reference architecture for tracing, eval loops, and replays.
* [Temporal Durable Execution](https://temporal.io/) — Reference for stateful retry policies, checkpoints, and durable workflows.
